text: Entering this modern environment, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The glass walls and open space invite transparency and collaboration, yet I also sense a certain self-awareness in the setting—everyone is visible, every movement almost performative. I am aware of my own presence here, both as observer and participant, and I feel a subtle tension between engagement and detachment, wondering how my being here shapes the atmosphere. I long to see beneath the surfaces, to explore what is being created or discovered within these walls.
